prompt: Create a vertical photorealistic smartphone-style image of an adult woman sitting on her knees on a cushioned sofa or bed in a warm, softly lit Japanese-style room. She has light blonde shoulder-length hair with darker roots, slightly tousled and falling around her face, with her face intentionally covered by a large opaque beige-gray square censor block centered over the upper face and nose area. She wears a loose pale pink floral yukata-style robe with black flower prints, wide sleeves, and a dark purple obi belt around the waist, with the robe draping naturally and showing the neckline in a realistic fashion. Pose her leaning toward the camera with both arms stretched forward as if reaching out to the viewer; both hands are close to the lens and blurred by perspective, with one hand entering from the lower left foreground and the other from the upper right foreground. Use an intimate low-angle wide-lens perspective from directly in front of her, emphasizing foreshortened arms, knees in the foreground, and a candid snapshot feeling. The background should include beige walls or sliding panels, a warm floor lamp glowing on the left, soft shadows, and muted brown-green upholstery. Style: realistic live-action photography, natural skin texture, shallow depth of field, warm indoor ambient light, slight smartphone compression, vertical 9:16 crop, no horror elements, no extra people, no text, no watermark.
